title: How to embed in Twilio Flex?
excerpt: I would like to embed my board in Twilio Flex so my internal team can use it from there. I see that Monday blocks iframes unless it is in shareable view, but the shareable view is not enough for my use case since it lack…

posts.author: turboroof (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to embed my board in Twilio Flex so my internal team can use it from there. I see that Monday blocks iframes unless it is in shareable view, but the shareable view is not enough for my use case since it lacks of search and other features (also its super slow without filters)

How can I disable the iframe protection?

posts.author: jmvandamme (Jean-Marie VANDAMME)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @turboroof. I have exactly the same need. I would like to use monday as CRM in twilio flex.
I have the same issue with iframe protection.
Did you find a way to manage that ?

Thx

posts.author: turboroof (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
@jmvandamme I didn’t figure this out and ended up dropping Twilio for other reasons.
Hopefully you’ll be able to find a workaround

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @turboroof and @jmvandamme! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
